title: Anyone using the Shopify / Monday integration to track Inventory and concerned about security?
excerpt: Anyone using the Shopify / Monday integration to track Inventory and concerned about security?  My IT Manager is concerned and I’d like to hear if anyone is using this and has concerns too and why.  Thanks!

posts.author: brianwbates (Brian Bates)
posts.cookedHtml: Anyone using the Shopify / Monday integration to track Inventory and concerned about security? My IT Manager is concerned and I’d like to hear if anyone is using this and has concerns too and why. Thanks!

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @brianwbates - I think the biggest point of concern would be controlling access and edit rights on the board where inventory is tracked. However, with proper permissions structure (which may or may not require Enterprise, it depends on the full scope of your needs), monday is highly secure. It also has a highly detailed activity log and audit trail that would help identify the user who made changes if problems were found. You can also show your IT manager this page: Trust Center | monday.com

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
